name: Deal Or No Deal
overview: Deal or No Deal is back! Join brand new host Stephen Mulhern for the return of one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time. Each episode a brave new contestant takes on the infamous Banker for the chance to win a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions in this gameshow, except for one; Deal or No Deal?

trailers.title: Deal Or No Deal | Monday 20th November on ITV1 & ITVX! | ITV
